UserService/src/main/java/com/broker/use.general_idea: Add the @Builder annotation to enable the builder pattern for constructing instances of the UserDeletedEvent class.
Remove the email field from the UpdateUserRequest DTO.
Remove the optional comment from the oldPassword field.
Remove the optional comment from the newPassword field.
Changed userId field from primitive long to wrapper Long to allow null values and ensure consistency with JPA entity conventions.
UserService/src/main/java/com/broker/use.human_impl: private long userId; -> private Long userId;

UserService/src/main/java/com/broker/use.general_idea: Annotate the application class with @EnableDiscoveryClient to register the service with a discovery server.
Added import for JwtFilter to enable JWT authentication filtering.
Added import for CustomUserDetailsService to support custom user authentication logic.
Added import for HttpMethod to specify HTTP methods in security rules.
Added import for AuthenticationManager to manage authentication processes.
Added import for ProviderManager to handle authentication providers.
Added import for DaoAuthenticationProvider to use DAO-based authentication.
Added import for Customizer to configure security components with defaults.
Added import for SessionCreationPolicy to manage session state.
Added import for UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter to position custom filters.
Autowired CustomUserDetailsService to provide user details for authentication.
Autowired JwtFilter to intercept requests for JWT validation.
Restricted public access to only the registration endpoint instead of all API paths.
Enabled HTTP Basic authentication with default configuration.
Set session management to stateless to support stateless JWT authentication.
Added JwtFilter before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter to process JWT tokens.
Defined AuthenticationManager bean using DaoAuthenticationProvider for custom user authentication.
UserService/src/main/java/com/broker/use.human_impl: @Bean public AuthenticationManager authenticationManager(...) { ... return new ProviderManager(authenticationProvider); }

UserService/src/main/java/com/broker/use.general_idea: Added a new POST endpoint for user login functionality.
Added a new PUT endpoint to update the currently authenticated user's profile.
Added a new DELETE endpoint to delete the currently authenticated user.
Integrated Spring Security context to retrieve the authenticated user's email for update and delete operations.
Added Lombok's @Slf4j annotation to enable logging in the controller.
Changed dependency injection from constructor-based (via @RequiredArgsConstructor) to field-based using @Autowired.
Remove the unused import for java.util.List to clean up the code.
Added a new login method to the service interface to support user authentication.
Changed the identifier for updating and deleting users from Long ID to String email.
UserService/src/main/java/com/broker/use.human_impl: UserResponse updateUser(String email, UpdateUserRequest request); void deleteUser(String email);

UserService/src/main/java/com/broker/use.general_idea: Removed the dedicated updatePassword method, likely consolidating it into the general updateUser method.
Inject KafkaTemplate to enable event publishing for user lifecycle events.
Inject AuthenticationManager to support login authentication logic.
Inject CustomUserDetailsService to load user details for JWT generation.
Inject JwtUtil to generate JWT tokens upon successful login.
Publish a UserCreatedEvent to Kafka after a new user is registered.
Implement login logic that authenticates credentials and returns a JWT.
Change updateUser method to identify user by email instead of ID and add password validation.
UserService/src/main/java/com/broker/use.human_impl: public UserResponse updateUser(String email, UpdateUserRequest request)

UserService/src/main/java/com/broker/use.general_idea: Change deleteUser method to identify user by email instead of ID.
Publish a UserDeletedEvent to Kafka after a user is deleted.

UserService/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler source and target version from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK.
Add explicit dependency for Jackson JSR-310 datatype to handle Java 8+ date/time types, likely to resolve serialization issues mentioned in git log.
Add JJWT API dependency to support JWT token generation and parsing for authentication.
Add JJWT implementation dependency to provide the runtime support for JWT operations.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency to enable Jackson-based serialization for JWT claims.
Add Spring Cloud Netflix Eureka Client dependency to enable service discovery capabilities.
Add Spring Boot Actuator dependency to expose operational endpoints for monitoring and management.
Add Spring Cloud Dependencies BOM to manage versions of Spring Cloud components consistently.
Remove Spring Boot DevTools dependency, likely to streamline the production build or due to migration preferences.

UserService/src/main/resources/applicati.general_idea: Changed the database URL host from localhost to 'postgres' to support Docker Compose networking.
Added Eureka client configuration to enable service registration and discovery.
Configured Eureka instance settings including IP preference and lease intervals.
Exposed specific Spring Boot Actuator endpoints for health, info, and metrics.
UserService/src/main/resources/applicati.human_impl:
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health,info,metrics
